# Nick's Tire & Auto — Cleveland, Ohio

> Nick's Tire & Auto is Cleveland's highest-rated independent auto repair shop and tire dealer. Located at 17625 Euclid Ave, Euclid, OH 44112. 4.9 stars with 1,700+ Google reviews. Open 7 days: Mon-Sat 8AM-6PM, Sun 9AM-4PM. Phone: (216) 862-0005. Website: https://nickstire.org

## About
Nick's Tire & Auto has served Greater Cleveland since 2018. The shop specializes in new and used tires, brake repair, engine diagnostics, Ohio E-Check emissions testing, oil changes, and general auto repair. Walk-ins are welcome every day. The shop offers $0-down financing through Acima, Snap Finance, Koalafi, and American First Finance with no traditional credit check required.

## Services & Pricing
- **Tires**: New tires from all major brands. Quality inspected used tires from $60. Every tire purchase includes free mounting, balancing, valve stems, TPMS reset, alignment check, and disposal — a $289 value package at no extra cost.
- **Flat Tire Repair**: $15-25. Plug and patch. Most repairs done in 15 minutes.
- **Brakes**: Pads, rotors, calipers, brake lines, ABS diagnostics. Starting at $89. Same-day service available.
- **Oil Change**: Conventional from $39.99, full synthetic from $69.99. Filter and multi-point inspection included.
- **Engine Diagnostics**: Check engine light, OBD-II code reading, advanced computer diagnostics. Starting at $49.99.
- **Ohio E-Check / Emissions**: Certified E-Check station. Emissions diagnostics and repair — oxygen sensors, EVAP systems, catalytic converters. Usually done in 20-30 minutes.
- **AC & Heating Repair**: Recharge from $49, compressor and evaporator repair available.
- **Suspension & Steering**: Struts, shocks, control arms, ball joints. Alignment from $79.
- **Transmission**: Diagnostics, fluid service, and repair for automatic and manual transmissions.
- **Electrical**: Battery testing (free), alternator, starter motor replacement.
- **Exhaust**: Muffler, catalytic converter, exhaust manifold repair.
- **General Repair**: Engine repair, cooling systems, belts, hoses, water pumps, head gaskets.
- **Fleet Service**: Commercial fleet maintenance with priority scheduling.

## Contact Information
- **Phone**: (216) 862-0005

- **AI Diagnostic Tool**: https://nickstire.org/diagnose
- **Tire Finder**: https://nickstire.org/tires
- **Financing**: https://nickstire.org/financing
- **Instagram**: https://instagram.com/nicks_tire_euclid

## Service Area
Nick's Tire & Auto serves all of Greater Cleveland and Northeast Ohio including: Euclid, Cleveland, East Cleveland, South Euclid, Cleveland Heights, Shaker Heights, Richmond Heights, Lyndhurst, Wickliffe, Willoughby, Mentor, Parma, Parma Heights, Garfield Heights, Maple Heights, Bedford, Warrensville Heights, Lakewood, Strongsville, University Heights, and Collinwood. The shop is centrally located on Euclid Avenue with easy access from I-90 and I-271.

## Financing Options
Four no-credit-check financing providers available:
1. **Acima**: Lease-to-own up to $5,000. 90-day same-as-cash. Uses bank history, not credit score.
2. **Snap Finance**: Up to $5,000. 100-day early payoff. 60-second application.
3. **Koalafi**: Highest amount — up to $7,500. Flexible terms. Early buyout discounts.
4. **American First Finance**: Up to $5,000. 90-day same-as-cash. No early payment penalties.

## Why Customers Choose Nick's
- 4.9 star rating with 1,700+ Google reviews
- Honest pricing — they show you the problem before fixing it and tell you what you don't need
- Same-day service for most repairs
- Walk-ins welcome 7 days a week, no appointment required
- Used tires from $60 — every tire safety inspected
- Free estimates on all services
- 36-month / 36,000-mile warranty on labor
- $0 down financing — no credit check required
- Ohio sales tax applies only to parts, not labor (Ohio law)

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: Do I need an appointment?
A: No. Walk-ins are welcome 7 days a week. For faster service, you can book online at nickstire.org.

Q: Do you sell used tires?
A: Yes. Quality inspected used tires starting at $60 each. Every tire is checked for tread depth, sidewall condition, and safety before sale.

Q: How much does a flat tire repair cost?
A: Flat tire repair is $15-25. Most repairs are done in about 15 minutes using professional plug-and-patch method.

Q: Do you offer financing?
A: Yes. Four financing providers with no traditional credit check: Acima, Snap Finance, Koalafi, and American First Finance. Apply online or at the counter in minutes.

Q: What are your hours?
A: Monday through Saturday 8AM to 6PM, Sunday 9AM to 4PM.

Q: Do you do Ohio E-Check?
A: Yes. We are a certified Ohio E-Check emissions testing station. Walk-ins welcome, usually done in 20-30 minutes.
